report_note: Lower public debt/GDP is interpreted as greater debt capacity.
Lower unemployment is interpreted as greater labour-market strength.
Higher R&D expenditure as a percentage of GDP is interpreted as stronger innovation capacity.
Higher adult tertiary educational attainment, age 25–64, is interpreted as stronger human-capital stock.
Lower net energy import dependency is interpreted as greater energy security. Negative raw values can occur for net exporters and are not clipped.
